repo_notes.content: This project is a React chat application developed as a university final project. It allows users to register, remain logged in using React Context and localStorage, and interact with contacts through a chat interface.

pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Explain the purpose of the project, the main features and the technologies used.

pages.title: Project Structure
pages.purpose: Describe the folder structure of the project and explain the purpose of the main directories and files.

pages.title: State Management
pages.purpose: Explain how React Context is used to manage global state such as logged users and chat messages.

pages.title: Routing
pages.purpose: Explain how React Router is used to navigate between pages such as login, register and chat.

pages.title: Chat System
pages.purpose: Explain how the chat functionality works including message creation, display and author detection.
